de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class StorePrinter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.FieldPrinter
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.StorePrinter

  •  class StorePrinter
extends FieldPrinter
    This class is used by LogicPrinter.java to print out store-terms, i.e. terms of the following form: store(heap, object, field, value)
    Author:
    Kai Wallisch

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.FieldPrinter
